name: Elegant Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1/2 quart casserole, combine the cream of mushroom soup, milk, soy sauce, and pepper.
2. Stir in the green beans and half of the onions.
3. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Top with the remaining onions.
5. Bake for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Makes 4 cups.
